items.issue: Forlax in workbook is macrogol 4000, not necessarily PEG 3350 + electrolytes
items.why_it_matters: CG99 specifically recommends PEG 3350 + electrolytes for disimpaction/maintenance.
items.recommended_action: Verify whether workbook product is appropriate equivalent; add PEG 3350+electrolytes product if available.

items.issue: IBS diagnosis needs baseline exclusion tests and red-flag override
items.why_it_matters: Drug-only IBS output without red-flag/lab gate risks missing IBD/cancer/coeliac disease.
items.recommended_action: Keep diagnosis/test gate before symptom-targeted IBS drug suggestions.

items.issue: IBS-C should not default to lactulose
items.why_it_matters: NICE discourages lactulose in IBS; workbook has Duphalac but it should not be first/default for IBS-C.
items.recommended_action: Use macrogol/other laxatives first; restrict lactulose.

items.issue: Amitriptyline for IBS is off-label and second-line
items.why_it_matters: TCA has anticholinergic/cardiac/overdose risks and should not appear as first-line IBS RX NOW.
items.recommended_action: Keep as refractory second-line with low-dose and review gate.

items.issue: Male LUTS BPH product gap: finasteride 1 mg is not BPH dosing
items.why_it_matters: Workbook has finasteride 1 mg hair-loss dose; BPH guideline requires 5ARI BPH pathway.
items.recommended_action: Add finasteride 5 mg/dutasteride verified product before unlocking 5ARI.

items.issue: Male LUTS/OAB drugs need retention/cognition/BP gates
items.why_it_matters: Anticholinergics can worsen retention/cognition; beta-3 agonists need BP/cardiac review; desmopressin needs sodium monitoring.
items.recommended_action: Add product-specific safety gates before RX NOW unlock.

items.issue: Gallstone disease rows are mostly referral/procedure logic
items.why_it_matters: Definitive management is imaging/surgery/ERCP, not routine OPD medication.
items.recommended_action: Implement as non-drug pathway/referral rows; only allow analgesia while safety-netting acute cholecystitis/cholangitis/pancreatitis.
